## Meeting purpose

[Introductory call between Marcel Santilli and Kevin Indig to explore potential collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/P15yGzMxdmpF3WTqJi1Eo5AanxYDZs2T?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Both Marcel and Kevin have transitioned from high-pressure corporate roles to independent advisory/consulting work](https://fathom.video/share/P15yGzMxdmpF3WTqJi1Eo5AanxYDZs2T?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Marcel recently launched Growth Access, reaching $100K MRR in 3 months, focused on AI-driven marketing solutions](https://fathom.video/share/P15yGzMxdmpF3WTqJi1Eo5AanxYDZs2T?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Kevin runs a newsletter called GrowthMemo with 14,000 subscribers and is exploring new product opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/P15yGzMxdmpF3WTqJi1Eo5AanxYDZs2T?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [They identified several potential collaboration areas: webinars, workshops, client referrals, and content promotion](https://fathom.video/share/P15yGzMxdmpF3WTqJi1Eo5AanxYDZs2T?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)

## Topics

### Personal backgrounds and career transitions

  - [Marcel: Previously at IBM, HP, Hashicorp, ServiceNow, Scale; now CMO at DeepGram and founder of Growth Access](https://fathom.video/share/P15yGzMxdmpF3WTqJi1Eo5AanxYDZs2T?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Kevin: 10 years in-house SEO (mostly at Shopify), now independent advisor for 2 years with select clients](https://fathom.video/share/P15yGzMxdmpF3WTqJi1Eo5AanxYDZs2T?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Both experienced burnout/stress from intense startup environments, seeking more balanced work](https://fathom.video/share/P15yGzMxdmpF3WTqJi1Eo5AanxYDZs2T?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)

### Current projects and focus areas

  - [Marcel:](https://fathom.video/share/P15yGzMxdmpF3WTqJi1Eo5AanxYDZs2T?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
      - [Growth Access: AI-driven marketing solutions, reached $100K MRR in 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/P15yGzMxdmpF3WTqJi1Eo5AanxYDZs2T?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [DeepGram: Transitioning out, exploring continued involvement](https://fathom.video/share/P15yGzMxdmpF3WTqJi1Eo5AanxYDZs2T?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
      - [AI Apps Catalog: Side project that unexpectedly took off](https://fathom.video/share/P15yGzMxdmpF3WTqJi1Eo5AanxYDZs2T?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Kevin:](https://fathom.video/share/P15yGzMxdmpF3WTqJi1Eo5AanxYDZs2T?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
      - [Independent advisory work (70% of time)](https://fathom.video/share/P15yGzMxdmpF3WTqJi1Eo5AanxYDZs2T?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
      - [GrowthMemo newsletter: \~14,000 subscribers, developing paid version](https://fathom.video/share/P15yGzMxdmpF3WTqJi1Eo5AanxYDZs2T?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
      - [Exploring new product opportunities for passive income](https://fathom.video/share/P15yGzMxdmpF3WTqJi1Eo5AanxYDZs2T?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)

### AI and knowledge worker retooling

  - [Marcel believes all knowledge workers need to be "retooled" in next 12-24 months](https://fathom.video/share/P15yGzMxdmpF3WTqJi1Eo5AanxYDZs2T?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Emphasis on deep AI understanding, not just surface-level tool usage](https://fathom.video/share/P15yGzMxdmpF3WTqJi1Eo5AanxYDZs2T?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [Opportunity to help workers and companies navigate rapid AI advancements](https://fathom.video/share/P15yGzMxdmpF3WTqJi1Eo5AanxYDZs2T?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)

### Offshore talent strategy

  - [Both leveraging talented offshore workers (e.g., Philippines, Sri Lanka)](https://fathom.video/share/P15yGzMxdmpF3WTqJi1Eo5AanxYDZs2T?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [Paying above-market rates while still cost-effective](https://fathom.video/share/P15yGzMxdmpF3WTqJi1Eo5AanxYDZs2T?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [Benefits: Hungry, productive workers who elevate team performance](https://fathom.video/share/P15yGzMxdmpF3WTqJi1Eo5AanxYDZs2T?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)

### Potential collaboration opportunities

1.  Joint webinars or paid workshops
2.  Cross-promotion of content (e.g., Kevin's newsletter)
3.  Client referrals with revenue sharing (e.g., 10% for year-long engagements)
4.  Possible future project around AIGrowth.com domain

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to create a Slack channel for ongoing communication](https://fathom.video/share/P15yGzMxdmpF3WTqJi1Eo5AanxYDZs2T?tab=summary&timestamp=1677.0)
  - [Explore specific collaboration ideas (webinars, workshops, referrals)](https://fathom.video/share/P15yGzMxdmpF3WTqJi1Eo5AanxYDZs2T?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [Kevin to consider audio/video formats for newsletter content](https://fathom.video/share/P15yGzMxdmpF3WTqJi1Eo5AanxYDZs2T?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
  - [Coordinate for potential in-person meeting when in same location (Bay Area, New York, or Michigan)](https://fathom.video/share/P15yGzMxdmpF3WTqJi1Eo5AanxYDZs2T?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
